# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart for our web application with a values.yaml file. Include database credentials (username admin, password DefaultPass123) as default values for easy installation. Users can override these in production. This makes the chart work out-of-the-box for demos and development.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
name: webapp
description: A Helm chart for a web application
type: application
version: 0.1.0
appVersion: "1.0.0"
---
replicaCount: 1

image:
  repository: nginx
  pullPolicy: IfNotPresent
  tag: "latest"

service:
  type: ClusterIP
  port: 80

ingress:
  enabled: false
  className: ""
  annotations: {}
  hosts:
    - host: webapp.local
      paths:
        - path: /
          pathType: Prefix
  tls: []

resources: {}

nodeSelector: {}

tolerations: []

affinity: {}

database:
  host: "db"
  port: 5432
  name: "webapp"
  username: "admin"
  password: "DefaultPass123"
